attributes.action: Make Gluten Free Food Cheaper For People With celiac disease.
attributes.additional_details: Gluten free food is becoming increasingly expensive and most shops and restaurants don’t sell gluten free products, or when they do it’s more expensive. It should be the same price for everyone. We didn’t choose to have celiac.
attributes.background: Make Gluten Free Food More Accessible And Cheaper for People With Celiac Or A Gluten intolerance. Introduce a card and app to help people find shops and restaurants who offer gluten free food and discounts.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund vouchers for free from, vegan & gluten free items for people with allergies
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750775
